title: Enjoy A Slice Of DGI Courtesy Domino's Pizza, But Wait For Better Entry Point
text: Domino's Pizza has a history of strong shareholder returns that appears likely to continue for years to come. This company has a solid business model, is well-managed, and is positioned for continued success even if a recession hits. The company's highly leveraged capital structure presents some risk, but I believe the company is well-positioned to manage this risk.

title: Domino's Pizza not so tasty as orders slow
text: Domino's Pizza shares were off the menu the takeaway giant warned demand had slowed in the three months to September. Orders over the quarter were 16.7 million or down 1.2% on this time a year ago, which it blamed on a dip in delivery orders though more collections cushioned some of the decline.

title: 7 Reasons To Avoid Domino's Pizza Today
text: If there is one pizza restaurant that everybody has seemingly ordered from at least once it would have to be Domino's Pizza, Inc.

title: 4 Restaurant Stocks Setting Up for a Year End Bull Run
text: After a very strong first quarter this year, many restaurant stocks experienced more challenging price action as the macro environment entered a period of elevated uncertainty. However, many of these stocks are reporting strong earnings this quarter and look ready to make another bull run into the year end.

title: My Top 15 High Growth Dividend Stocks For November 2023
text: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF posted its third consecutive losing month in October, the first time this has happened since I started tracking this series in September 2020. The top 15 dividend growth stocks for November offer an average dividend yield of 1.90% and appear to be about 40% undervalued based on dividend yield theory. Since inception, September 2020, the watchlist is outperforming VIG by 1.49% and SPY by 1.18%, on an annualized basis.

title: DPC Dash Continues to Lead Domino's Global Sales with Newly Opened Stores in China
text: The two new stores opened on September 30, 2023, in Jiaxing, Zhejiang Province, have achieved the rank of No.5 and No.7 in Domino's global system record for sales in the first 30 days. DPC Dash stores in China now hold the record as the top eight for first 30-day sales across the Domino's system globally as of Oct 31, 2023.

title: After Hitting Pause On Major Initiatives, These Companies Are Finally Getting Back to Long-Term Plans
text: The coronavirus pandemic changed just about everything overnight. Not only did people see their lives upended, so did companies, which had to deal with shifts in consumption and supply chain upheavals.
